repairedFindings: P1 seed lookup no longer calls global detectIrregularRegions or enumerates unrelated components
P1 component identity no longer relies on FNV32 source identity
P1 subtract command resolves only from an exact own-data canonical project Regions view
P2 input, selection, intent, adapter, options and callback results use own-data boundaries
P2 visual evidence is a tracked PNG captured by the real Chrome runner
P1 subtract no longer accepts any callback that can declare or certify Region ownership
P1 self-consistent copied Region metadata cannot authorize region-unrelated when project.regions does not contain it
P2 subtract has no remove callback or equivalent post-resolution execution boundary; it constructs the exact data-only region.remove/reject command internally
P2 revoked proxies and isCancelled/add callbacks now fail through stable redacted boundaries

independentReview.evidence: Independent fifth review reran 16/16 and confirmed closed-world add-only adapter, canonical unique Region resolution, internal data-only remove command, zero external effects, hostile boundaries, undo, browser telemetry and PNG integrity.

seedLookup.semantics: S1-01 strict alpha threshold, explicit 4/8 connectivity, minimum pixel/width/height policy, dimension and 16,777,216-pixel limits
seedLookup.maxRegionsPolicy: validated for recipe parity but intentionally irrelevant to one seed component; unrelated components cannot fail a wand hit

identity.digestInput: versioned domain separator, exact UTF-8 sourceAssetId, source dimensions, first offset, pixel count, bounds and exact row-major RLE membership
identity.sourceEquality: sameComponentSet and intent diff also compare exact sourceAssetId
identity.bounds: fixed 76-character valid non-empty component ID; source IDs are capped at 4096 UTF-16 code units at this boundary

selection.deduplication: same exact source/component preserves prior snapshot and emits no intent
selection.aggregate: frozen deterministic source bounds and row-major RLE union mask
selection.cancellation: Escape preserves prior identity; cooperative flood cancellation throws before returning a next snapshot

commands.history: all mutations adapt to one canonical command.batch
commands.subtract: the adapter validates canonical project.regions own data, internally requires one unique Region matching assetId, exact bounds, provenance.source=wand and provenance.sourceId=the component SHA identity, then directly constructs the exact region.remove/reject data command
commands.canonicalRelation: Region has the actual model relation assetId+bounds+EntityProvenance source/sourceId; ProcessingRecipe has no Region foreign key, so no invented recipe metadata is used
commands.callbacks: only add materializes the expected regions.commitRecipe command; subtract has no callback after canonical resolution
commands.storeOwnership: none; the host supplies the canonical StudioProjectV1 Regions view

hostileBoundary.policy: exact own enumerable data records are read and rebuilt; accessors/symbols/sparse arrays/non-finite values/cycles reject
hostileBoundary.callbacks: isCancelled/add throws are redacted and add callback result accessors are rejected without getter execution
hostileBoundary.proxies: revoked and throwing proxies at selection/seed/bounds/canonical project Regions/adapter/intent/result boundaries are contained and converted to stable TypeErrors

reviewRepros: three disconnected components with maxRegions=1: seed hit succeeds without global enumeration
known FNV32 collision asset-haumha-jsez3r versus asset-1koyyyc-k2ukzu: SHA IDs differ and replace emits remove plus add
SHA-256 component ID matches independent node:crypto expected digest
attempted remove effect carrying a self-consistent region-unrelated copy is rejected as an extra adapter field and executes zero times
zero canonical Region matches reject before remove executes
more than one canonical Region match rejects as ambiguous before remove executes
input and selection accessors reject with zero getter reads
unique canonical match produces the exact internal region.remove/reject literal with no external effect boundary
throwing input and canonical Regions proxies are contained and redacted
revoked selection, seed, bounds and adapter proxies reject with stable boundary errors
canonical project/regions getters and revoked proxies reject without execution or secret leakage
PRIVATE_CANCEL_SECRET and private add callback failures are redacted
otherCases: overlapping component bounds with exact seed membership
repeated add, subtract last, replace clear and deterministic aggregate mask
transparent, outside, strict threshold and diagonal connectivity
large flood cancellation at head=4096 with no global pass
canonical add and remove command application with full undo round-trips

visualEvidence.fixture: 6x4 L/step alpha component with 6 selected pixels

performance.fixture: 1024x1024 fully opaque RGBA, center seed, one seed-local flood plus RLE

verification.details: real Chrome captured tracked PNG and observed Runtime/Log/Network/HTTP/console counters at zero
JSON parsed; untracked-file diff-check passed; PNG bytes and SHA-256 match observed Chrome output

knownRisks: Selection remains synchronous; a future non-blocking host should execute this pure seam at the existing worker boundary.
Transparent proxies cannot be identified portably in browser JavaScript; throwing traps are contained, while accepted payloads are rebuilt only from own data.
The browser proof is isolated; tool activation and focus return remain S1-04/G8 scope.
